changelog:
v2.7.0 — Frontend design polish (ease of use for non-technical volunteers)

  • Unified blue palette across every page — admin, search, single entry, glossary, suggest form
  • Bumped small body text to 14px minimum so older eyes can read it
  • Content Wizard: help text is now visible below each label (no more disappearing placeholder hints); added a "4 quick steps, ~5 minutes" scope cue at the top; required-field legend; more confident submit button
  • Front-end: tighter hero subtitle; a friendly "Coming soon" panel on brand-new sites with zero entries (plus a one-click "Add your first entry" shortcut for editors)
  • Single-entry page: lighter Table of Contents that doesn't compete with the article; explicit related-cards breakpoints at tablet/desktop; print + copy-answer buttons float to the top-right on wider screens
  • Post editor sidebar: PTA Hub meta boxes now share a subtle accent so they read as one group; Entry Details promoted to the top, QR Code and Network Sharing collapsed to the bottom
  • Visibility meta box now always shows current state ("Visible to everyone" or "Restricted") with collapsible controls
  • Search Analytics: visual bars next to every count make hot vs cold queries obvious at a glance
  • "Needs Review" dashboard widget: red dot next to each entry's last-reviewed date so urgency reads instantly
  • Suggest a topic form: live character counters, 5-character minimum, accent strip on the footer CTA
  • Suggestions queue: "Convert to Draft" row action now bold blue so it's distinct from the standard Trash action
  • Starter Content Importer: "already imported" warning now reads as a prominent yellow strip
  • Standardized all transition timings to 150ms and rounded all tags to pill shape

v2.6.3 — UI polish

  • Fixed misaligned icon on the "Create Entry" / "Update Entry" button in the Content Wizard

v2.6.2 — UI polish

  • Fixed misaligned plus icon on "Add Step / Add Link / Add Item / Add Timeline Item" buttons in the Content Wizard

v2.6.1 — Suggest a topic, related-entry hints in the Wizard

  • New public form lets parents and members suggest topics they wish were in the hub — submissions queue up under PTA Knowledge → Suggestions, ready to convert into drafts
  • "Suggest a topic" CTA now appears at the bottom of every single entry
  • The Content Wizard now suggests related existing entries based on the category and title you've entered — with a one-click button to insert a markdown link into your description
  • Internal: search engine refactored to expose a reusable PTK_Search_Engine::search() method

v2.6.0 — Reading time, QR codes, review reminders, preview links

  • Single entries now show estimated reading time and an auto-generated Table of Contents (entries with 3+ headings)
  • New "QR Code" sidebar in the post editor — download a PNG to print on table tents
  • "Last Reviewed" column and dashboard widget for stale entries (12-month threshold)
  • Generate a 7-day public preview link for draft entries — share with reviewers without giving them an admin login

v2.5.0

  • Print footer uses the site name automatically
  • Wizard defaults to Draft instead of Published
  • "Edit in Wizard" button on success screen
  • Editors can now see Search Analytics and Content Gaps
  • Public feedback widget no longer shows raw vote counts
  • Hub URL configurable via ptk_hub_slug option / ptk_hub_url filter

v2.4.0

  • Council entries auto-share to every school site by default
  • One-click "Sync all entries now" button on the Network Sync page
